Department Chair's Message

MENU

Prof. Mehmet Reşat Başar

Head of Department

Visual communication design is a multidisciplinary field that combines the visual arts, design and technology. At the Visual Communication Department, we aim at creating a dynamic learning environment where our students gain knowledge, critical skills and experience as artists and designers. Our students are encouraged to become critical and innovative actors in their chosen field. Department facilities include art studios, photography studio, media and visual communications labs, printmaking studio, wood and metal workshops. Graduates of the Visual Communication Design Department can develop their careers in the following professional specializations: Photography, Graphic Design, Advertising, Visual Arts, Print Making, Video, Film, Media and New Media, Publishing, Web Design, and Interactive Design.
